name: swarm.alm-position-check
description: Cron-driven ALM v4 LP position scan. Every 15 minutes, ALM re-reads the user's Uniswap v4 LP positions, classifies them (in-range / drifting / out-of-range), and emits a swarm.alm.rebalance intent on drift. Router consumes the rebalance and ALM tracks the receipt.
